blog_title: Bulk Plain Tshirt First Order Mistakes — How ₹2 Lakh & 1500 Pieces Went Wrong in 2017
caption:
₹45 polyester tee destroyed 300 pieces in one monsoon. 😬

Print bubbled. Sweat trapped under. Loss? Full batch gone.

Cotton absorbs moisture. Polyester doesn't. In rain season, that difference costs thousands.

200 GSM bio-washed cotton = stable prints even in downpour. Cheap polyester = gamble.

Save this if you're sourcing bulk tees for monsoon. 👇
